name: TrueMoney Thailand Digital Wallet API
what_it_does: TrueMoney (Ascend Money) Thailand digital wallet REST API for merchants, e-commerce platforms, and service providers to accept payments from Thailand's leading digital wallet with 20M+ users, enabling QR code payments, cash top-up acceptance, TrueMoney Wallet payment integration, bill payment, and cross-border payments within Southeast Asia's Ascend Money ecosystem covering Thailand, Cambodia, Myanmar, Vietnam, Indonesia, and the Philippines. Enables AI agents to manage TrueMoney wallet payment for Thai consumer checkout automation, handle QR code generation for cashless payment automation, access bill payment integration for utility and service automation, retrieve payment status for transaction verification automation, manage refund processing for payment reversal automation, handle webhook notification for payment event automation, access cross-border payment for SEA regional expansion automation, retrieve transaction history for reconciliation automation, manage top-up acceptance for cash-in at agent network automation, and integrate TrueMoney with Thai e-commerce, delivery apps, and service platforms for end-to-end Thai digital wallet automation.
use_cases: Accepting TrueMoney Wallet payments from Thai consumers for e-commerce checkout agents
Generating QR codes for in-store TrueMoney cashless payment from POS automation agents
Processing bill payments and utility top-ups through TrueMoney for service platform agents
Integrating TrueMoney into food delivery and transport app checkout for SEA market agents
not_for: Non-SEA markets (TrueMoney is Thailand-primary with SEA expansion only)
International wire transfers to non-Ascend Money countries
Cryptocurrency or digital asset payments (TrueMoney is traditional e-money only)
best_when: A Thai e-commerce merchant, delivery app, or service platform wanting AI agents to accept payments from TrueMoney Wallet's 20M+ Thai users through Ascend Money's digital wallet and QR payment API.
avoid_when: MERCHANT REGISTRATION IS REQUIRED IN THAILAND: TrueMoney merchant API requires Thai business registration (BOL or corporate entity); automated foreign company merchant integration without Thai entity creates eligibility failure. QR CODE IS DYNAMIC AND TIME-LIMITED: TrueMoney QR codes have expiry time; automated QR code reuse creates expired_qr error; automated must generate new QR code for each payment transaction. PAYMENT CONFIRMATION IS ASYNC VIA WEBHOOK: TrueMoney payment confirmation is pushed via webhook after consumer wallet approval; automated synchronous payment confirmation after QR display creates premature success assumption; automated must await webhook before fulfillment. BOT-OF-THAILAND REGULATIONS APPLY: TrueMoney is e-money regulated by Bank of Thailand (BOT); automated high-value transaction assumption without KYC tier creates transaction limit rejection for unverified wallets.

auth.notes: TrueMoney uses OAuth 2.0 for merchant API authentication. REST API with JSON. Bangkok, Thailand HQ. Founded 2003. Ascend Money (Charoen Pokphand/Ant Group joint venture). Products: TrueMoney Wallet, Rabbit LINE Pay, cross-border SEA, bill payment, top-up. SDKs: None public. BOT-licensed. AML/KYC regulated. 20M+ Thai users. 75,000+ agent network. Competes with Rabbit LINE Pay and PromptPay for Thai digital payments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox testing available for approved merchants; production requires TrueMoney merchant agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Transaction fee negotiated; typically 1.5-3% per transaction depending on merchant category
pricing.notes: Bangkok TH. Ascend Money (CP Group/Ant Group). BOT-licensed e-money. Transaction fee model. THB primary.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per merchant OAuth client; payment and QR APIs throttled; webhooks for payment events

known_agent_gotchas: THAI MERCHANT ENTITY REQUIRED: TrueMoney merchant API requires Thai-registered business entity; automated foreign company integration without Thai entity creates ineligibility at onboarding; automated integration with TrueMoney requires Thai corporate presence

QR CODE HAS EXPIRY TIME: TrueMoney payment QR codes expire (typically 15-30 minutes); automated QR code reuse or long-display creates expired_qr rejection when consumer scans; automated must regenerate QR code for each payment session

ASYNC WEBHOOK PAYMENT CONFIRMATION: TrueMoney payment confirmed via webhook after consumer approves in app; automated synchronous confirmation after QR display creates premature success; automated fulfillment must await TrueMoney webhook callback

WALLET TRANSACTION LIMITS BY KYC TIER: TrueMoney wallet users have daily/monthly transaction limits based on KYC verification level; automated high-value transaction assumption creates over-limit rejection for unverified wallet users; automated must handle transaction_limit_exceeded gracefully

DOCUMENTATION PRIMARILY IN THAI: TrueMoney developer documentation is largely in Thai; automated integration without Thai reading capability creates documentation barrier; automated integration requires Thai language or bilingual developer
agent_readiness.security_notes: Thai e-money wallet. BOT regulated. PDPA. OAuth2. TH. Payment and user identity data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Thailand e-money. BOT regulated. AML. OAuth2. TH. Payment and identity data.
